Package net.minheur.potoflux.settings.types

Interface ISettingType<S>

Type Parameters:
S - type of setting data. Needs to be one of PreferencesTypes.getValueClass(), because only them are supported in the prefs saving.
All Known Implementing Classes:
CheckboxSetting, ComboSetting
public interface ISettingType<S>
Interface used to create setting type
See Also:
  • CheckboxSetting
  • ComboSetting

  • Property Summary

    Properties
    Type
    Property
    Description
    ObservableValue<?>
    value
    Gets the property for the selected value, allowing to check if exists or bind it to FX components

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    S
    getDefaultValue()
    Needs to be the type of the PreferencesTypes.getValueClass() associated in prefType()
    Node
    getExecutionNode()
    Gets the node to pair with getIsModifiedLabel() when adding the setting to the list.
    Label
    getIsModifiedLabel()
    Paired with getExecutionNode(), it allows the user to know that the value is modified but not yet saved, by displaying a !.
    Will also get a restart reminder graphic if the setting needs to do so to be saved.
    Object
    getSelectedValue()
    Gets the selected value directly as raw
    PreferencesTypes
    prefType()
    Type of preference this is.
    void
    selectValue(@NotNull Object value)
    Selects a value from an object.
    ObservableValue<?>
    valueProperty()
    Gets the property for the selected value, allowing to check if exists or bind it to FX components

  • Property Details

    • value

      ObservableValue<?> valueProperty
      Gets the property for the selected value, allowing to check if exists or bind it to FX components

  • Method Details

    • getExecutionNode

      Node getExecutionNode()
      Gets the node to pair with getIsModifiedLabel() when adding the setting to the list.
      Returns:
      the node that allows to choose the setting's state

    • getIsModifiedLabel

      Label getIsModifiedLabel()
      Paired with getExecutionNode(), it allows the user to know that the value is modified but not yet saved, by displaying a !.
      Will also get a restart reminder graphic if the setting needs to do so to be saved.
      Returns:
      the modified state label

    • prefType

      PreferencesTypes prefType()
      Type of preference this is. Used to check that selected value or value to select is the right type
      Returns:
      the PreferencesTypes of the setting

    • getDefaultValue

      @NotNull S getDefaultValue()
      Needs to be the type of the PreferencesTypes.getValueClass() associated in prefType()
      Returns:
      the default value for the setting

    • selectValue

      void selectValue(@NotNull @NotNull Object value)
      Selects a value from an object.
      Parameters:
      value - objet containing the value to select

    • getSelectedValue

      Object getSelectedValue()
      Gets the selected value directly as raw
      Returns:
      the raw selected value

    • valueProperty

      ObservableValue<?> valueProperty()
      Gets the property for the selected value, allowing to check if exists or bind it to FX components
